requirements.requirement: Establish a risk-based technology audit programme covering all key technology risk domains
requirements.rationale: Provides independent assurance of technology risk management effectiveness

requirements.requirement: Maintain readiness for SC regulatory examinations with current evidence and documentation
requirements.rationale: Ensures efficient and effective response to regulatory scrutiny

requirements.requirement: Conduct annual penetration testing of critical market systems by qualified independent testers
requirements.rationale: Identifies exploitable vulnerabilities in market-facing systems
